description_long: This is a single-story modern house surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a large driveway leading to a covered garage. The structure is predominantly rectangular with clean lines and a flat roof, complemented by landscaped greenery along the perimeter and near the entryway. The exterior walls are light-colored, with several large windows distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entrance is set back from the driveway, accessible via a short path flanked by shrubs and small trees. The garage is attached and extends outward from the main building, providing sheltered parking. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped surroundings enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long boundary wall, flat roof, and attached garage extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, main entry path, and landscaped garden leading to the house entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the garage on the left and the house's rectangular layout visible behind the wall.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the enclosed backyard, additional windows, and more landscaping along the back wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door accessed via a short landscaped path, no porch, minimal overhang, and simple modern styling
